features.subheading: Vid2Podcast transforms how you consume video content — turning passive watching into active learning.

items.title: Instant Transcript
items.desc: Full transcript extracted in seconds from any YouTube video — no waiting, no sign-up required.

items.title: AI Summary
items.desc: Multiple summary modes — TLDR, key points, detailed notes, or Twitter thread format.

items.title: 50+ Languages
items.desc: Listen in your native language. Translate transcripts into 50+ languages with one click.

items.title: Natural TTS
items.desc: High-quality text-to-speech using browser voices (free) or Google Neural2 voices (Pro).

items.title: Ask About Video
items.desc: Chat with the transcript. Ask questions, get answers, and deep-dive into any topic.

items.title: Export Everywhere
items.desc: Download as MP3, TXT, SRT, PDF. Send to Notion, Obsidian or NotebookLM.

howItWorks.subheading: No complex setup. No learning curve. Just paste and play.

steps.title: Paste any YouTube URL
steps.desc: Copy a YouTube link and paste it into Vid2Podcast — or use the Chrome extension directly on the page.

steps.title: Choose language & mode
steps.desc: Pick your target language and summary type. We'll fetch the transcript and translate it instantly.

steps.title: Listen, read, and explore
steps.desc: Play the audio, read the transcript, get a summary, or chat with the content — all in one place.

pricing.subheading: Choose the plan that works for you. Cancel anytime.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For power users — pay once, keep forever

items.a: Yes! The Chrome extension and web app are free to use with 1 conversion per day and limited AI chat. The Pro plan ($9.99 one-time, no subscription) removes all limits.

items.q: What YouTube videos does it work with?
items.a: Any YouTube video that has captions available — auto-generated or manual. Most videos have auto-generated captions in at least one language.
We use server-side translation to convert the transcript to your chosen language. The translation preserves meaning and context, not just word-for-word translation.

items.q: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
items.a: Free gives you 1 conversion/day, 2 AI chat messages, and browser TTS. Pro is a one-time payment that unlocks unlimited conversions, unlimited chat, Google Neural2 voices, and priority processing.

items.q: Do I need to create an account?
items.a: No account needed for basic conversions. Sign in with Google to save your history, sync settings, and access Pro features.
The web app at vid2podcast.com works on any device. The Chrome extension is desktop-only (Chrome, Brave, Edge).

cta.subheading: Join thousands of users who save hours every week by converting YouTube videos to podcasts.
